language.name: English
app.name: LiAuth
onboarding.tagline: Your codes. Your device. Nothing else.
onboarding.title: Create a password
onboarding.subtitle: It protects everything stored in LiAuth. Only you know it.
lock.subtitle: Enter your password to continue
lock.wrongPassword: That password is not right. Try again.
lock.quickUnlockUnavailable: Quick unlock is not available right now
reset.title: Reset password
reset.warning: This permanently deletes all your accounts and codes on this device. There is no way to get them back. Continue?
lock.biometricUnavailable: Biometric unlock is not available right now
home.emptySubtitle: Tap + to add your first account
home.noResultsSubtitle: Try a different search or group
categories.title: Groups
categories.subtitle: Organize accounts into groups like Finance or Gaming
categories.editSubtitle: Rename this group or remove it. The accounts inside stay in your vault.
categories.hintDesktop: Right-click a group to rename or delete it
categories.hintMobile: Long-press a group to rename or delete it
qr.title: QR code
qr.subtitle: Scan it with another device to move this account
delete.title: Delete {name}?
delete.subtitle: You will not be able to sign in with codes from this account anymore. Make sure you turned off two-step verification for it or have another way in.
add.title: Add account
add.subtitle: Scan a QR code, import a file or enter a key
add.importFile: Import from file or another app
add.noQrFound: No QR code found. Try a clearer image.
add.invalidKey: This key does not look right. Check it and try again.
import.passwordSubtitle: Enter the password it was saved with
import.unrecognized: This file is not supported. LiAuth can import its own backups and exports from Google Authenticator, Aegis, 2FAS and Authy.
edit.title: Edit account
settings.title: Settings
settings.hideCodesHint: Codes on the main screen stay hidden until you tap them
settings.blockCaptureHint: The app stays invisible in screenshots, screen recordings and the app switcher
settings.quickUnlockHint: Uses secure storage on this computer
settings.biometricHint: Use your fingerprint or face to open the app
settings.exportHint: The backup is protected with a password and can be opened on any device with LiAuth
settings.advancedHint: These options are for experienced users. Accounts work correctly without changing anything here.
export.title: Save backup
export.subtitle: Choose a password for this backup. You will need it to restore your accounts.
sync.title: Sync
sync.subtitle: Move your accounts to another device on the same Wi-Fi. Nothing leaves your network.
sync.hint: Open Sync on both devices to begin
sync.receiveTitle: On the other device, choose Send and enter this code:
sync.receiveHint: Keep this window open. The code works once.
sync.noDevicesHint: Make sure the other device shows the code screen and both are on the same Wi-Fi
sync.codeRejected: The code did not match. Try again.
error.saveFailed: Could not save. Check free space and try again.
error.keychainUnavailable: Secure storage is not available on this computer
permission.cameraSubtitle: LiAuth uses the camera only to scan QR codes. Nothing is recorded.
lock.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Try again in {seconds} s.
toast.vaultRepaired: Storage check finished, minor issues repaired
delete.trashSubtitle: The account moves to the trash and stays there for 30 days, so you can bring it back if you change your mind.
trash.title: Trash
trash.subtitle: Deleted accounts stay here for 30 days, then disappear forever
edit.notesHint: Anything worth remembering about this account
edit.recoveryHint: One code per line. Stored encrypted with everything else.
settings.animationsHint: Subtle fades between screens. Turn off for an instant interface.
settings.brandIconsHint: Show real service logos (Simple Icons) on brand-colored backgrounds instead of plain monochrome avatars
settings.autoBackupHint: Keeps an encrypted copy of your data in a folder of your choice after every change
webdav.title: Cloud backup (WebDAV)
webdav.hint: Upload encrypted backups to Nextcloud, a NAS or any WebDAV server after every change
webdav.backupPasswordHint: Backups are encrypted with this password before upload. The server only ever sees ciphertext.
timeSync.title: Check clock accuracy
timeSync.result: Clock is off by {seconds} s. Codes now use the corrected time.
